---
title: Get rewards for user
---

> ## Documentation Index
> Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://docs.capillarytech.com/llms.txt
> Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.

## Get rewards for user

This API gives all the details for the reward purchased such as Reward ID, Metadata, Intouch points, Programs/tiers, Reward restrictions/limits, and Catalog promotions applied.

<Callout kind="tip" title="Note">

* For detailed information about our APIs and for hands-on testing. Refer to the documentation in [API Overview](https:/docs.capillarytech.com/reference/apioverview). Follow the step-by-step guide on making your first API call in [Make Your First API Call](https:/docs.capillarytech.com/reference/make-your-first-api-call).

* When **[Dual Eligibility](https:/docs.capillarytech.com/docs/customer_entity#dual-eligibility)** is enabled, a reward can be issued to multiple users registered with the same secondary identifiers, as long as they have unique primary identifiers.

</Callout>

## Prerequisites

* [ ] Authentication: Basic or OAuth authentication
* [ ] Default access group

## Resource information

|                        |                                                                             |
| :--------------------- | :-------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| URI                    | `/api_gateway/rewards/core/v1/user/reward/brand{BrandName}?userId={userID}` |
| HTTP Method            | GET                                                                         |
| Pagination             | Yes                                                                         |
| Batch support          | No                                                                          |
| Rate limit information | None                                                                        |

## API endpoint example

`https:/eu.api.capillarytech.com/api_gateway/rewards/core/v1/user/reward/brand/BUKL?userId=555567088&redemptionType=VENDOR_ONLY_REWARD,MILES&activationStatus=ENABLED&minPoints=750&maxPoints=1000&minCash=100&maxCash=500&status=UPCOMING&sortBy=endDate&createdOnDaysAgo=4`

## Request path parameters

| Parameters   | Data Type | Description                 |
| :----------- | :-------- | :-------------------------- |
| Brand Name* | String    | Name of the brand. Ex: BUKL |

## Request query parameters

| Parameters       | Data Type | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| ---------------- | --------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| userId           | Long      | Retrieves rewards for a perticular user. Enter the userid customerid. `Example`: `98662653`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| includeExpired   | Boolean   | Includes details of expired rewards in the response. Pass `includeExpired` as `true`.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| page             | Integer   | To retrieve details of a specific page. Pass 0 not to apply pagination. For example, page=2\ and size=10 shows 10 results on page 2.                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| size             | Long      | Results to show per page.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| groupName        | List      | Retrieves rewards associated with a specific group name. Multiple group names are supported by a comma (","). **Example**: `groupName`= `groupname1,groupname2`.                                                                                                                                                                          |
| label            | String    | Retrieves rewards linked to a specific label. Provide label ID to retrieve all rewards linked to the label. **Example:** `3`.                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| category         | List      | Retrieves rewards linked to a specific category. Provide the category name to retrieve all rewards linked to that specific category. **Example:** `fuel`.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| redemptionType   | List      | Retrieves rewards based on their redemption type. **Supported values**: `GAMES, AUCTION, CART_PROMOTION, CASH_WALLET, VENDOR_ONLY_REWARD, VOUCHER, CASH_BACK, INTOUCH_REWARD, PHYSICAL_REWARD, CHARITY, MILES, GIFT_CARD, SWEEPSTAKES, VENDOR_INTOUCH_REWARD, CARD_DISC`. Multiple redemptionType values can be filtered using comma (,). |
| activationStatus | String    | Retrieves the reward details based on their activation status. **Supported Values**: `ENABLED`, `DISABLED`, `ALL`. Supported values are case sensitive.                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| minPoints        | Integer   | Specifies the minimum points threshold for filtering rewards based on the points used for their purchase. For example: If the minimum points are set to **100**, only rewards purchased with points greater than or equal to 100 will be included. This parameter is case-sensitive.                                                      |
| maxPoints        | Integer   | Specifies the maximum points threshold for filtering rewards based on the points used for their purchase. For example: If the maximum points are set to **100**, rewards with points exceeding this value will not be included. This parameter is case-sensitive.                                                                         |
| minCash          | Integer   | Specifies the minimum cash threshold for filtering rewards based on the cash used for their purchase. For example: If the minimum cash is set to **100**, rewards purchased using cash below this amount will not be included. This parameter is case-sensitive.                                                                          |
| maxCash          | Integer   | Specifies the maximum cash threshold for filtering rewards based on the cash used for their purchase. For example: If the maximum cash is set to **100**, rewards with cash exceeding this amount will not be included. This parameter is case-sensitive.                                                                                 |
| status           | String    | ​​Retrieves the reward details based on their status. **Supported Values**: `LIVE`, `UPCOMING`, `ENDED`. Multiple status can be filtered via a comma (e.g., `LIVE,ENDED`). Supported values are case sensitive.                                                                                                                           |
| vendorId         | List      | Retrieves the rewards associated with a specific vendor, based on the vendor ID. Multiple vendor IDs are supported by a comma (","). **Example**: `vendor` = `36,32`. There is no specific limit on the number of vendorIds.                                                                                                              |
| createdOnDaysAgo | Integer   | Retrieves a list of rewards created before a specific number of days. For example:- If today is January 20 and createdOnDaysAgo=5 is passed, rewards created on or before January 15 will be retrieved, while those created after January 15 will be excluded.                                                                            |
| sortBy           | String    | Sorts the reward based on `points`, `cash`, `startDate` and `endDate`. **NOTE:** If `sortBy` param is not passed, sorting will happen on reward creation date in DESC order.                                                                                                                                                              |
| orderBy          | String    | Specifies the order in which results should be sorted. Supported values: "`ASC`" for ascending, "`DESC`" for descending.                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |

## Response parameters

| Field                        | Type    | Description                                                                                                                                                    |
| :--------------------------- | :------ | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| status                       | Object  | An object that contains the status of the response.                                                                                                            |
| .success                     | Boolean | Indicates whether the request was successful. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                |
| .code                        | Integer | The HTTP status code or a custom status code indicating the outcome of the request. Values are defined in `StatusCode.java` (e.g., 200, 404, 500, 6001, etc.). |
| .message                     | String  | A message describing the response. Corresponds to a message from `StatusCode.java` or a custom message.                                                        |
| rewardList                   | Array   | An array that indicates all the rewards a customer received.                                                                                                   |
| .id                          | Long    | Indicates the unique identifier for the reward.                                                                                                                |
| .name                        | String  | Indicates the name of the reward.                                                                                                                              |
| .description                 | String  | Indicates the description of the reward.                                                                                                                       |
| .imageId                     | String  | Indicates the unique identifier of the reward's image.                                                                                                         |
| .imageUrl                    | String  | Indicates the URL of the reward's image.                                                                                                                       |
| .thumbnailId                 | String  | Indicates the Unique identifier of the reward's thumbnail image.                                                                                               |
| .thumbnailUrl                | String  | Indicates the URL of the reward's thumbnail image.                                                                                                             |
| .termAndConditionsId         | String  | Indicates the unique identifier for the terms and conditions.                                                                                                  |
| .termAndConditionsUrl        | String  | Indicates the URL for the terms and conditions.                                                                                                                |
| .tier                        | String  | Indicates the tier associated with the reward.                                                                                                                 |
| .label                       | String  | Indicates the label which contains a message for the reward.                                                                                                   |
| .priority                    | Integer | Indicates the priority of the reward.                                                                                                                          |
| .intouchPoints               | Integer | Indicates the number of points required for the reward.                                                                                                        |
| .group                       | String  | Indicates the group the reward belongs to. Can be an empty string.                                                                                             |
| .startTime                   | String  | Indicates the start time of the reward.                                                                                                                        |
| .startDateTime               | String  | Indicates the start date and time of the reward.                                                                                                               |
| .endTime                     | String  | Indicates the end time of the reward.                                                                                                                          |
| .endDateTime                 | String  | Indicates the end date and time of the reward.                                                                                                                 |
| .expired                     | Boolean | Indicates if the reward has expired. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                         |
| .started                     | Boolean | Indicates if the reward period has started. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                  |
| .enabled                     | Boolean | Indicates if the reward is enabled. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                          |
| .programId                   | Long    | Indicates the unique identifier of the program associated with the reward.                                                                                     |
| .categoryList                | Array   | Indicates the list of categories the reward belongs to.                                                                                                        |
| ..id                         | long    | Indicates the unique identifier for the category.                                                                                                              |
| ..name                       | String  | Indicates the name of the category.                                                                                                                            |
| ..enabled                    | Boolean | Indicates if the category is enabled. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                        |
| ..createdOn                  | Date    | Indicates the date when the reward was created.                                                                                                                |
| ..lastUpdatedOn              | Date    | Indicates the date when the reward was last updated.                                                                                                           |
| ..createdBy                  | Long    | Indicates the system generated unique identifier of the user who created it.                                                                                   |
| ..lastUpdatedBy              | Long    | Indicates the system generated unique identifier of the user who last updated it.                                                                              |
| ..createdOnDateTime          | String  | Indicates the date and time when the reward.                                                                                                                   |
| ..lastUpdatedOnDateTime      | String  | Indicates the date and time when the reward was last updated.                                                                                                  |
| .customFields                | Object  | Indicates the object which contains the custom fields.                                                                                                         |
| .status                      | String  | Indicates the current status of the reward.                                                                                                                    |
| .redemptionType              | Enum    | Indicates the type of redemption.                                                                                                                              |
| .vendorId                    | Long    | Indicates the unique identifier of the vendor.                                                                                                                 |
| .loyaltyProgramCriteria      | Array   | Indicates the Criteria for the loyalty program.                                                                                                                |
| ..loyaltyProgramId           | Integer | Indicates the unique identifier of the loyalty program.                                                                                                        |
| ..tierIds                    | Object  | Indicates the unique identifiers of the tiers.                                                                                                                 |
| ..partnerProgramIds          | Object  | Indicates the unique identifier of partner programs.                                                                                                           |
| .groups                      | Array   | Indicates the list of groups associated with the reward.                                                                                                       |
| ..groupName                  | String  | Indicates the unique identifier name of the group.                                                                                                             |
| ..groupRank                  | Integer | Indicates the unique identifier rank of the group.                                                                                                             |
| .rewardRestrictions          | Object  | Indicates the object containing restrictions for the reward.                                                                                                   |
| ..isValid                    | Boolean | Indicates if the restrictions are valid. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                     |
| ..customerLevel              | Array   | Indicates the restrictions at the customer level.                                                                                                              |
| ...id                        | Integer | Indicates the unique identifier  for the customer level restriction.                                                                                           |
| ...isValid                   | Boolean | Indicates if the customer level restriction is valid. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                        |
| ...consumed                  | Integer | Indicates the unit of reward consumed until now based on the type of restriction.                                                                              |
| ...repeatFrequencyType       | String  | Indicates the reset frequency type of the restriction.                                                                                                         |
| ...limit                     | Integer | Indicates the limit set by the restriction at customer level.                                                                                                  |
| ...interval                  | Integer | indicates the interval set for the restriction.                                                                                                                |
| ...kpi                       | String  | Indicates the type of key performance indicator set for the restriction at customer level                                                                      |
| ...windowType                | String  | Indicates the type of reset window set for the restriction at reward level.                                                                                    |
| ...startOfCycle              | String  | Indicates the date and time when the window cycle started.                                                                                                     |
| ...currentCycle              | Object  | Indicates current cycle details.                                                                                                                               |
| ....startDate                | String  | Indicates the start date of the current cycle.                                                                                                                 |
| ....endDate                  | String  | Indicates the end date of the current cycle.                                                                                                                   |
| ..rewardLevel                | Array   | Indicates the restrictions set at the reward level.                                                                                                            |
| ...id                        | Integer | Indicates the  unique identifier for the reward level restriction.                                                                                             |
| ...isValid                   | Boolean | Indicates if the reward level restriction is valid. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                          |
| ...consumed                  | Integer | Indicates the unit of reward consumed until now based on the restriction set for the reward.                                                                   |
| ...repeatFrequencyType       | String  | Indicates the frequency type set of the restriction at reward level.                                                                                           |
| ...limit                     | Integer | Indicates the limit set by the restriction at customer level.                                                                                                  |
| ...kpi                       | String  | Indicates the type of key performance indicator set for the restriction at reward level.                                                                       |
| ...windowType                | String  | The type of window set for the restriction at reward level.                                                                                                    |
| ...weekStartDay              | String  | The starting day of the week for the restriction.                                                                                                              |
| ...currentCycle              | Object  | The current cycle details.                                                                                                                                     |
| ....startDate                | String  | The start date of the current cycle.                                                                                                                           |
| ....endDate                  | String  | The end date of the current cycle.                                                                                                                             |
| .rewardRank                  | Integer | The rank of the reward. Can be null.                                                                                                                           |
| .images                      | Array   | A list of image objects for the reward.                                                                                                                        |
| ..name                       | String  | The name of the image.                                                                                                                                         |
| ..altText                    | String  | The alt text for the image.                                                                                                                                    |
| ..id                         | Object  | The ID of the image. Can be null.                                                                                                                              |
| ..url                        | String  | The URL of the image.                                                                                                                                          |
| ..isExternal                 | Boolean | Indicates if the image is external. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                          |
| .videos                      | Array   | A list of video objects for the reward.                                                                                                                        |
| ..name                       | String  | Indicates the name of the video.                                                                                                                               |
| ..altText                    | String  | Indicates the alt text for the video.                                                                                                                          |
| ..id                         | Object  | Indicates the unique identifier of the video. Can be null.                                                                                                     |
| ..url                        | String  | Indicates the URL of the video.                                                                                                                                |
| ..isExternal                 | Boolean | Indicates if the video is external. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                          |
| .paymentConfigs              | Array   | Indicates the configuration for payment methods.                                                                                                               |
| ..paymentMode                | String  | Indicates the mode of payment                                                                                                                                  |
| ..id                         | Integer | Indicates the unique identifier for the payment configuration.                                                                                                 |
| ..points                     | Float   | Indicates the number of points for payment.                                                                                                                    |
| ..cash                       | Float   | Indicates the cash amount for payment.                                                                                                                         |
| ..conversionRatio            | Float   | Indicates the conversion ratio for payment.                                                                                                                    |
| pagingDto                    | Object  | Indicates an object containing pagination details.                                                                                                             |
| .last                        | Boolean | Indicates if this is the last page. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                          |
| .totalElements               | long    | Indicates the total number of elements.                                                                                                                        |
| .totalPages                  | long    | Indicates the total number of pages.                                                                                                                           |
| .numberOfElements            | int     | Indicates the number of elements on the current page.                                                                                                          |
| .first                       | Boolean | Indicates if this is the first page. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                         |
| .size                        | int     | Indicates the size of the page.                                                                                                                                |
| .number                      | int     | Indicates the current page number.                                                                                                                             |
| orgLevelRestrictions         | Object  | Indicates an object containing organization-level restrictions.                                                                                                |
| .isValid                     | Boolean | Indicates if the restrictions are valid. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                     |
| .customerRedemptionTypeLevel | Array   | Indicates the list of customer redemption type restrictions.                                                                                                   |
| ..rewardConstraintId         | Integer | Indicates the ID of the reward constraint.                                                                                                                     |
| ..orgId                      | Integer | Indicates the ID of the organization.                                                                                                                          |
| ..kpi                        | String  | Indicates the Key Performance Indicator for org level restriction.                                                                                             |
| ..constraintLevel            | String  | Indicates at what level is the constraint set for the reward.                                                                                                  |
| ..frequencyType              | String  | Indicates the reset frequency of the constraint.                                                                                                               |
| ..constraintLimitValue       | Integer | Indicates the limit value for the constraint.                                                                                                                  |
| ..isActive                   | Boolean | Indicates if the constraint is active. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                       |
| ..intervalValue              | Integer | Indicates the interval value for the constraint.                                                                                                               |
| ..isValid                    | Boolean | Indicates if the constraint is valid. Possible values: `true`, `false`.                                                                                        |
| ..consumed                   | Integer | Indicates the quantity of reward consumed.                                                                                                                     |
| ..createdOn                  | Date    | Indicates the creation date.                                                                                                                                   |
| ..lastUpdatedOn              | Date    | Indicates the last update date.                                                                                                                                |
| ..createdBy                  | Long    | Indicates the system generated id of the user who created it.                                                                                                  |
| ..lastUpdatedBy              | Long    | Indicates the system generated id of the user who last updated it.                                                                                             |
| ..createdOnDateTime          | String  | Indicates the date and time when the restriction was created.                                                                                                  |
| ..lastUpdatedOnDateTime      | String  | Indicates the date and time when the restriction was last updated.                                                                                             |
| ..redemptionType             | String  | Indicates the type of redemption.                                                                                                                              |

| Error Code | Description                                                   |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **15006**  | The request is missing the primary identifier.                |

## OpenAPI definition

```json
{
  "openapi": "3.1.0",
  "info": {
    "title": "v1",
    "version": "1.0"
  },
  "servers": [
    {
      "url": "https://{host}",
      "variables": {
        "host": {
          "default": "host"
        }
      }
    }
  ],
  "components": {
    "securitySchemes": {
      "sec0": {
        "type": "http",
        "scheme": "basic"
      }
    }
  },
  "security": [
    {
      "sec0": []
    }
  ],
  "paths": {
    "/api_gateway/rewards/core/v1/user/reward/brand/{BrandName}?userId={userID}": {
      "get": {
        "summary": "Get rewards for user",
        "description": "",
        "operationId": "get-rewards-for-user",
        "parameters": [
          {
            "name": "userId",
            "in": "query",
            "description": "User ID of the customer",
            "schema": {
              "type": "string"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "BrandName",
            "in": "path",
            "description": "Name of the brand.",
            "schema": {
              "type": "string"
            },
            "required": true
          },
          {
            "name": "groupName",
            "in": "query",
            "description": "Enter the group name to fetch all the rewards associated with the group.",
````
